chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

text: وَ قَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "لَرَكْعَتَانِ يُصَلِّيهِمَا مُتَزَوِّجٌ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ رَجُلٍ عَزَبٍ يَقُومُ لَيْلَهُ وَ يَصُومُ نَهَارَهُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4347 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Two units of prayer performed by a married person are better than an unmarried man who spends his nights in prayer and his days fasting."
